query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alunos WHERE contratoInicio IS NOT NULL) as alunos_com_contrato_inline,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contratos_aluno WHERE isActive = 1) as contratos_tabela,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alunos WHERE isActive = 1) as total_alunos_ativos;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alunos WHERE contratoInicio IS NOT NULL) as alunos_com_contrato_inline,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contratos_aluno WHERE isActive = 1) as contratos_tabela,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alunos WHERE isActive = 1) as total_alunos_ativos;
